title: Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles
summary: 用户提议在Hacker News上为AI生成的文章添加标记功能，以便不喜欢AI文本的人可以跳过，同时讨论现有投票系统是否足够以及HN是否应适应生成AI时代。
highlights: Should HN add the ability to flag articles as AI-generated?
it could just show up as an indicator, allowing others (like myself) who don't like reading AI-generated text, to skip it
Why is the regular voting system not enough?
Should HN change in response to the gen AI era?
